name: cashsnap_three_stage_strictbest_trueempty_synthreal24_denom_reclassifier_stack

evidence.summary: Strictbest detector plus true-empty gate plus weak-USD-augmented synthetic+real-24/class train-fragment crop-transfer denomination reclassifier, with KHR_50000 override blocked, improved real-test recall 0.6438 -> 0.7809, precision 0.3809 -> 0.4620, exact-value images 945 -> 1021, and KHR MAE 1279.77 -> 766.01. Real-full crop reclassifier upper bound reached recall 0.8262 and exact-value 1031; pure-synth weak-USD crop-transfer reclassifier gave a smaller lift to recall 0.6659 and exact-value 973.

known_limits: Diagnostic stack only; the denomination reclassifier uses a small real labeled crop anchor and is not pure synthetic-transfer proof.
The detector still has 129 no-box false negatives on real test at IoU 0.50; reclassification cannot recover absent proposals.
KHR_50000 override is blocked because the fragment-aware reclassifier otherwise creates high-value false positives; remove only after a replacement guard is verified.
The reclassifier changes denomination classes after proposal rejection; downstream UI must preserve detector boxes while replacing class labels.
The class order differs from detector order and must be mapped by class name, not index.
